engine.name: Propulsion
engine.description: Increases Max Speed and Acceleration by 10% per level.

cargo.name: Cargo Bay
cargo.description: Adds 10 units of cargo capacity per level.

hull.name: Hull Plating
hull.description: Increases Max Hull Integrity by 25 per level.

shield.name: Deflector Shield
shield.description: Increases Max Shield Capacity by 15 per level.

computer.name: Trade Computer
computer.description: Unlocks Market Analysis. Lvl 2: Nearby Prices. Lvl 6: System-wide Prices.

defense.name: Auto-Defense
defense.description: Automated turret engages nearby enemies. Rate/Range improves with level.
